# Addis Reality | Digital Marketing in Ethiopia

> Digital marketing in Ethiopia, Addis Reality (AR Solutions PLC) is the top-rated digital marketing, advertising, branding, web development, media production, event planning, training, and trading solutions company based in Kazanchis, Addis Ababa.

Addis Reality helps businesses across Ethiopia rank on Google, grow on social media, and build brands through digital marketing in Ethiopia, SEO, paid advertising, web design, and creative services.

## Key Facts

- **Company**: Addis Reality (Addis Reality PLC / AR Solutions PLC / AR solution trading PLC)
- **Website**: https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com
- **Location**: 8th floor, Kazadis Building, Kazanchis, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
- **Email**: arsolution83@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +251 983 606 745
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Languages**: English, Amharic
- **Service Area**: Ethiopia nationwide (Addis Ababa, Bahir Dar, Hawassa, Mekelle, Dire Dawa, Adama, Gondar, Jimma)

## Services

- [Advertising & Printing](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/advertising-printing): Banners, vehicle branding, office signage, merchandise, Ethiopia
- [Digital Marketing in Ethiopia](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/digital-marketing): Social media, Google Ads, Meta ads, SEO, influencer marketing, Addis Ababa
- [Branding & Design](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/branding-design): Logo design, brand identity, visual strategy, Ethiopia
- [Media Production](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/media-production): Video, photography, promotional content, Addis Ababa
- [Web Development](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/web-development): Custom websites, e-commerce, technical SEO, Ethiopia
- [Event Planning](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/event-planning): Corporate events, conferences, product launches, Ethiopia
- [Training & Development](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/training-development): Corporate training, workshops, media training, Ethiopia
